implementation.hook: maybe_seed appends the newly accepted seed Lot, then calls pair_inventory with trigger_lot when export is enabled. pair_inventory records a close row only when that trigger lot participates in a pair before inventory mutation.
implementation.behavior_preservation: When --selected-close-actions-output is unset, close_recorder is None and the existing pair_inventory metrics/mutation path is unchanged.

state_fields_added.Lot.lot_id: default-empty optional stable residual lot id
state_fields_added.Lot.original_qty: default-zero optional accepted seed quantity so multi-pair close rows do not confuse remaining qty with original action qty
state_fields_added.State.condition_id: default-empty optional condition id for stable close_action_id and lookup keys

source_truth_boundary.interpretation: The export provides selected close-action rows for a later bounded replay_store_v2 validation response. It is not private truth, strategy economics, deployable evidence, shadow-ready evidence, canary evidence, or promotion evidence.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SELECTED_CLOSE_ACTION_EXPORT_DEFAULT_OFF_READY
research_ranking.interpretation: Current pair_inventory/Lot state is sufficient to identify the newly accepted seed and paired opposite residual lot before mutation, so selected close-action export is implementable.

next_action.description: Extend the replay_store_v2 truth validation response builder/scorer or add a small adapter so selected_close_action_export_v1 rows can become strict_rescue_closes.csv rows through bounded selected source-row lookups only.

pass_fail_criteria_for_next.KEEP: Builder/scorer adapter accepts selected_close_action_export_v1 rows, performs bounded replay_store_v2 lookups by day/condition/close_ts/side, writes strict_rescue_closes.csv with refs/fee checks, and preserves private/deployable/promotion guards false.
pass_fail_criteria_for_next.UNKNOWN: Builder/scorer cannot map export fields to truth_validation_response_v1 strict_rescue_closes without exact missing fields named.
pass_fail_criteria_for_next.DISCARD: Adapter would require broad replay discovery, hard-coded fee rates, external private truth, frozen mechanisms, or promotion claims.
